sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 276 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1. 2. For orders on CMA No.1086/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1087/2020. 30.09.2025 Mr. Fahad Hussain Areejo, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel, the controversy in this reference is squarely covered by a Division Bench judgment of this court passed in Fatima Fertilizers case reported as 2020 PTD 484 and in pursuance thereof, the question to be answered against the applicant department and in favour of the respondent; and reference be dismissed, subject to right of appeal of the department before the Supreme Court. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
